name: Black Bean Sweet-Potato Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 medium red bell pepper, stemmed, seeded and coarsely chopped
1 can low-sodium peeled and diced tomatoes, undrained (14.5 oz)
1 cup vegetable or low-sodium chicken broth
1 large sweet potato or yam, peeled, diced into 1/2-inch pieces
1 can low-sodium black beans, drained and rinsed (15-oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, heat the olive oil over medium-low heat.
2. Add the onion and about 1/4 cup water. Cover and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in the garlic, bell peppers, and jalapeno. Cook for another 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in the chili powder, cumin, ground red pepper, and salt. Cook for 1 minute.
5. Add the remaining tomato juice, diced tomatoes, broth, and sweet potato pieces. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to a simmer.
6. Simmer uncovered for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Stir in the black beans and simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
8. If using, stir in the cilantro and serve. Yield: 6 servings. Per serving: 24 Calories; 2g Fat (61% calories from fat); 0g Protein; 2g Carbohydrate; 0mg Cholesterol; 282mg Sodium.
